description: HarmonyOS ArkTS port of animate.css v4.1.1 — a cross-platform animation library providing 97 keyframe-based animations via HarmonyOS keyframeAnimateTo API. Maps CSS @keyframes to ArkTS KeyframeState arrays with typed animation options.

files.description: Shared types: AnimTransform (translate, scale, rotate, opacity, skew), AnimOptions (duration, delay, iterations, curve, onFinish). Declares the KeyframeState factory pattern used by all animation functions.

exports.name: AnimTransform
exports.signature: class AnimTransform { translateX: number; translateY: number; scaleX: number; scaleY: number; rotateZ: number; opacity: number; skewX: number; skewY: number }
exports.description: Unified transform state object for keyframe callbacks. All values have defaults (translate=0, scale=1, rotate=0, opacity=1, skew=0).
exports.arkts_notes: Class with explicit property types — no untyped object literals. Used as the parameter type for keyframe update callbacks.

exports.name: AnimOptions
exports.signature: interface AnimOptions { duration: number; delay?: number; iterations?: number; curve?: Curve; onFinish?: () => void }
exports.description: Animation configuration: duration (ms), optional delay, iteration count, timing curve, and completion callback.
exports.arkts_notes: Curve type from @kit.ArkUI. duration is required (no default — callers must be explicit).

files.description: 12 attention-seeking animations: bounce, flash, pulse, rubberBand, shakeX, shakeY, headShake, swing, tada, wobble, jello, heartBeat.

exports.name: bounce
exports.description: Bouncing up-and-down with scaleY squash/stretch. Cubic-bezier timing per keyframe. transform-origin: center bottom.
exports.arkts_notes: Multi-stop keyframe. translateY + scaleY transforms. Default duration 1000ms.

exports.name: flash
exports.description: Toggle opacity 1→0→1→0→1 at 25%/75%.

exports.name: pulse
exports.description: Scale up to 1.05 then back to 1.0. ease-in-out timing.

exports.name: rubberBand
exports.description: Rubber band stretch: scaleX/scaleY alternate overshoot/undershoot. 7 keyframe stops.
exports.arkts_notes: scaleX/scaleY independently at each stop. Default duration 1000ms.

exports.name: shakeX
exports.description: Horizontal shake: translateX ±10px at 10% intervals.

exports.name: shakeY
exports.description: Vertical shake: translateY ±10px at 10% intervals.

exports.name: headShake
exports.description: Head shake: translateX + rotateY at fractional percentages (6.5%, 18.5%, 31.5%, 43.5%, 50%). ease-in-out.
exports.arkts_notes: translateX + rotateY combo. Irregular keyframe stops. Default duration 1000ms.

exports.name: swing
exports.description: Pendulum swing: rotateZ 15°→-10°→5°→-5°→0°. transform-origin: top center.

exports.name: tada
exports.description: Tada: alternating scale(0.9)/scale(1.1) with ±3° rotateZ at each stop.
exports.arkts_notes: scale + rotateZ combo. 10 keyframe stops. Default duration 1000ms.

exports.name: wobble
exports.description: Wobble: translateX percentages with decreasing rotateZ amplitude (5°→3°→2°→1°).
exports.arkts_notes: translateX percentages + rotateZ. 7 stops. Default duration 1000ms.

exports.name: jello
exports.description: Jello: skewX/skewY with decreasing amplitude (-12.5°→6.25°→-3.125°→1.5625°→-0.78125°→0.390625°→-0.1953125°). transform-origin: center.
exports.arkts_notes: skewX + skewY. Requires ArkUI skew support. Default duration 1000ms.

exports.name: heartBeat
exports.description: Heart beat: scale(1)→1.3→1→1.3→1 at 0%/14%/28%/42%/70%. ease-in-out. Duration ×1.3.

files.description: 8 back-perspective animations: backInDown, backInLeft, backInRight, backInUp (entrances) and backOutDown, backOutLeft, backOutRight, backOutUp (exits). Entrances fly in scaled to 0.7 with opacity 0.7 then snap to full; exits reverse.

exports.name: backInDown
exports.description: Enter from above (-1200px), scale(0.7) + opacity 0.7 until 80%, then snap to full at 100%.

exports.name: backInLeft
exports.description: Enter from left (-2000px), scale(0.7) + opacity 0.7 until 80%, snap to full at 100%.

exports.name: backInRight
exports.description: Enter from right (2000px), scale(0.7) + opacity 0.7 until 80%, snap to full at 100%.

exports.name: backInUp
exports.description: Enter from below (1200px), scale(0.7) + opacity 0.7 until 80%, snap to full at 100%.

exports.name: backOutDown
exports.description: Exit downward: snap to scale(0.7)/opacity 0.7 at 20%, fly to translateY(700px) at 100%.
exports.arkts_notes: translateY + scale + opacity. Reverse pattern of backIn.

exports.name: backOutLeft
exports.description: Exit left: snap to scale(0.7)/opacity 0.7 at 20%, fly to translateX(-2000px) at 100%.

exports.name: backOutRight
exports.description: Exit right: snap to scale(0.7)/opacity 0.7 at 20%, fly to translateX(2000px) at 100%.

exports.name: backOutUp
exports.description: Exit upward: snap to scale(0.7)/opacity 0.7 at 20%, fly to translateY(-700px) at 100%.

files.description: 10 bouncing animations with overshoot/undershoot rubber-band physics: bounceIn, bounceInDown, bounceInLeft, bounceInRight, bounceInUp (entrances) and bounceOut, bounceOutDown, bounceOutLeft, bounceOutRight, bounceOutUp (exits). All use cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1).

exports.name: bounceIn
exports.description: Bounce in: scale 0.3→1.1→0.9→1.03→0.97→1.0 with opacity 0→1. Duration ×0.75.
exports.arkts_notes: scale only + opacity. 7 stops. Default duration 750ms.

exports.name: bounceInDown
exports.description: Bounce in from above: translateY -3000px→25px→-10px→5px→0 with scaleY 3→0.9→0.95→0.985→1.
exports.arkts_notes: translateY + scaleY + opacity. 5 stops. Default duration 1000ms.

exports.name: bounceInLeft
exports.description: Bounce in from left: translateX -3000px→25px→-10px→5px→0 with scaleX 3→1→0.98→0.995→1.

exports.name: bounceInRight
exports.description: Bounce in from right: translateX 3000px→-25px→10px→-5px→0 with scaleX 3→1→0.98→0.995→1.

exports.name: bounceInUp
exports.description: Bounce in from below: translateY 3000px→-20px→10px→-5px→0 with scaleY 5→0.9→0.95→0.985→1.

exports.name: bounceOut
exports.description: Bounce out: scale 0.9→1.1→0.3 with opacity 1→0. Duration ×0.75. 4 stops.
exports.arkts_notes: scale + opacity. Reverse of bounceIn. Default duration 750ms.

exports.name: bounceOutDown
exports.description: Bounce out downward: small overshoot upward then fly down 2000px with scaleY 3.

exports.name: bounceOutLeft
exports.description: Bounce out left: translateX 20px→-2000px with scaleX 0.9→2, opacity 1→0.

exports.name: bounceOutRight
exports.description: Bounce out right: translateX -20px→2000px with scaleX 0.9→2, opacity 1→0.

exports.name: bounceOutUp
exports.description: Bounce out upward: small overshoot downward then fly up -2000px with scaleY 3.

files.description: 13 fade-in animations: fadeIn, fadeInDown, fadeInDownBig, fadeInLeft, fadeInLeftBig, fadeInRight, fadeInRightBig, fadeInUp, fadeInUpBig, fadeInTopLeft, fadeInTopRight, fadeInBottomLeft, fadeInBottomRight. All are 2-keyframe (from→to) opacity+translate.

exports.name: fadeIn
exports.description: Simple opacity 0→1. No translate.

exports.name: fadeInDown
exports.description: Fade in from above: translateY(-100%)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInDownBig
exports.description: Fade in from far above: translateY(-2000px)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInLeft
exports.description: Fade in from left: translateX(-100%)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInLeftBig
exports.description: Fade in from far left: translateX(-2000px)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInRight
exports.description: Fade in from right: translateX(100%)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInRightBig
exports.description: Fade in from far right: translateX(2000px)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInUp
exports.description: Fade in from below: translateY(100%)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInUpBig
exports.description: Fade in from far below: translateY(2000px)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInTopLeft
exports.description: Fade in from top-left: translate(-100%, -100%)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInTopRight
exports.description: Fade in from top-right: translate(100%, -100%)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInBottomLeft
exports.description: Fade in from bottom-left: translate(-100%, 100%)→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: fadeInBottomRight
exports.description: Fade in from bottom-right: translate(100%, 100%)→0 + opacity 0→1.

files.description: 13 fade-out animations: fadeOut, fadeOutDown, fadeOutDownBig, fadeOutLeft, fadeOutLeftBig, fadeOutRight, fadeOutRightBig, fadeOutUp, fadeOutUpBig, fadeOutTopLeft, fadeOutTopRight, fadeOutBottomRight, fadeOutBottomLeft. All 2-keyframe opacity+translate reverse of entrances.

exports.name: fadeOut
exports.description: Simple opacity 1→0. No translate.

exports.name: fadeOutDown
exports.description: Fade out downward: opacity 1→0 + translateY 0→100%.

exports.name: fadeOutDownBig
exports.description: Fade out far downward: opacity 1→0 + translateY 0→2000px.

exports.name: fadeOutLeft
exports.description: Fade out left: opacity 1→0 + translateX 0→-100%.

exports.name: fadeOutLeftBig
exports.description: Fade out far left: opacity 1→0 + translateX 0→-2000px.

exports.name: fadeOutRight
exports.description: Fade out right: opacity 1→0 + translateX 0→100%.

exports.name: fadeOutRightBig
exports.description: Fade out far right: opacity 1→0 + translateX 0→2000px.

exports.name: fadeOutUp
exports.description: Fade out upward: opacity 1→0 + translateY 0→-100%.

exports.name: fadeOutUpBig
exports.description: Fade out far upward: opacity 1→0 + translateY 0→-2000px.

exports.name: fadeOutTopLeft
exports.description: Fade out to top-left: opacity 1→0 + translate 0→(-100%, -100%).

exports.name: fadeOutTopRight
exports.description: Fade out to top-right: opacity 1→0 + translate 0→(100%, -100%).

exports.name: fadeOutBottomRight
exports.description: Fade out to bottom-right: opacity 1→0 + translate 0→(100%, 100%).

exports.name: fadeOutBottomLeft
exports.description: Fade out to bottom-left: opacity 1→0 + translate 0→(-100%, 100%).

files.description: 5 3D flip animations using perspective+rotate3d: flip, flipInX, flipInY, flipOutX, flipOutY. Uses backface-visibility.

exports.name: flip
exports.description: Full Y-axis flip: rotate3d(0,1,0,-360°→0°) with perspective(400px) and scale adjustments. 5 stops with ease-out/ease-in curves.
exports.arkts_notes: rotateY + scale. perspective() may require rotate with anchor. ⚠️ 3D transforms have limited ArkUI support.

exports.name: flipInX
exports.description: Flip in on X-axis: rotate3d(1,0,0,90°→-20°→10°→-5°→0) with opacity 0→1.
exports.arkts_notes: rotateX + opacity. 5 stops. ⚠️ 3D rotateX may degrade to 2D.

exports.name: flipInY
exports.description: Flip in on Y-axis: rotate3d(0,1,0,90°→-20°→10°→-5°→0) with opacity 0→1.
exports.arkts_notes: rotateY + opacity. 5 stops. ⚠️ 3D rotateY may degrade to 2D.

exports.name: flipOutX
exports.description: Flip out on X-axis: rotateX 0→-20°→90° with opacity 1→0. Duration ×0.75.

exports.name: flipOutY
exports.description: Flip out on Y-axis: rotateY 0→-15°→90° with opacity 1→0. Duration ×0.75.

files.description: 4 lightspeed animations with skew + translate: lightSpeedInRight, lightSpeedInLeft, lightSpeedOutRight, lightSpeedOutLeft.

exports.name: lightSpeedInRight
exports.description: Whoosh in from right: translateX(100%)→0 + skewX(-30°→20°→-5°→0). ease-out.
exports.arkts_notes: translateX + skewX + opacity. 4 stops. ⚠️ Verify ArkUI skew support.

exports.name: lightSpeedInLeft
exports.description: Whoosh in from left: translateX(-100%)→0 + skewX(30°→-20°→5°→0). ease-out.

exports.name: lightSpeedOutRight
exports.description: Whoosh out to right: opacity 1→0 + translateX 0→100% + skewX 0→30°. ease-in.

exports.name: lightSpeedOutLeft
exports.description: Whoosh out to left: opacity 1→0 + translateX 0→-100% + skewX 0→-30°. ease-in.

files.description: 10 rotation animations: rotateIn, rotateInDownLeft, rotateInDownRight, rotateInUpLeft, rotateInUpRight (entrances) and rotateOut, rotateOutDownLeft, rotateOutDownRight, rotateOutUpLeft, rotateOutUpRight (exits). Entrances rotate from angle to 0; exits rotate from 0 to angle. Varying transform-origin points.

exports.name: rotateIn
exports.description: Rotate in: rotateZ -200°→0 + opacity 0→1. transform-origin: center.

exports.name: rotateInDownLeft
exports.description: Rotate in from bottom-left: rotateZ -45°→0 + opacity 0→1. transform-origin: left bottom.
exports.arkts_notes: rotateZ + opacity. 2 stops. ⚠️ transform-origin may not have exact ArkUI equivalent.

exports.name: rotateInDownRight
exports.description: Rotate in from bottom-right: rotateZ 45°→0 + opacity 0→1. transform-origin: right bottom.

exports.name: rotateInUpLeft
exports.description: Rotate in from top-left: rotateZ 45°→0 + opacity 0→1. transform-origin: left bottom.

exports.name: rotateInUpRight
exports.description: Rotate in from top-right: rotateZ -90°→0 + opacity 0→1. transform-origin: right bottom.

exports.name: rotateOut
exports.description: Rotate out: rotateZ 0→200° + opacity 1→0. transform-origin: center.

exports.name: rotateOutDownLeft
exports.description: Rotate out to bottom-left: rotateZ 0→45° + opacity 1→0.

exports.name: rotateOutDownRight
exports.description: Rotate out to bottom-right: rotateZ 0→-45° + opacity 1→0.

exports.name: rotateOutUpLeft
exports.description: Rotate out to top-left: rotateZ 0→-45° + opacity 1→0.

exports.name: rotateOutUpRight
exports.description: Rotate out to top-right: rotateZ 0→90° + opacity 1→0.

files.description: 8 sliding animations: slideInDown, slideInLeft, slideInRight, slideInUp (entrances) and slideOutDown, slideOutLeft, slideOutRight, slideOutUp (exits). Use visibility property (not opacity).

exports.name: slideInDown
exports.description: Slide in from above: translateY(-100%)→0. visibility: visible.

exports.name: slideInLeft
exports.description: Slide in from left: translateX(-100%)→0. visibility: visible.

exports.name: slideInRight
exports.description: Slide in from right: translateX(100%)→0. visibility: visible.

exports.name: slideInUp
exports.description: Slide in from below: translateY(100%)→0. visibility: visible.

exports.name: slideOutDown
exports.description: Slide out downward: translateY 0→100%. visibility: hidden at end.
exports.arkts_notes: translateY only. visibility hidden on final keyframe.

exports.name: slideOutLeft
exports.description: Slide out left: translateX 0→-100%. visibility: hidden at end.

exports.name: slideOutRight
exports.description: Slide out right: translateX 0→100%. visibility: hidden at end.

exports.name: slideOutUp
exports.description: Slide out upward: translateY 0→-100%. visibility: hidden at end.

files.description: 4 special animations that don't fit other categories: hinge, jackInTheBox, rollIn, rollOut.

exports.name: hinge
exports.description: Hinge drop: rotateZ 0→80°→60°→80°→60° then translateY 700px + opacity→0. transform-origin: top left. Duration ×2.
exports.arkts_notes: rotateZ + translateY + opacity. 5 stops. Default duration 2000ms.

exports.name: jackInTheBox
exports.description: Jack-in-the-box popup: scale 0.1→1 + rotateZ 30°→-10°→3°→0 + opacity 0→1. transform-origin: center bottom.
exports.arkts_notes: scale + rotateZ + opacity. 4 stops. Default duration 1000ms.

exports.name: rollIn
exports.description: Roll in from left: translateX(-100%)→0 + rotateZ -120°→0 + opacity 0→1.

exports.name: rollOut
exports.description: Roll out to right: translateX 0→100% + rotateZ 0→120° + opacity 1→0.

files.description: 10 zoom animations: zoomIn, zoomInDown, zoomInLeft, zoomInRight, zoomInUp (entrances) and zoomOut, zoomOutDown, zoomOutLeft, zoomOutRight, zoomOutUp (exits). Scale-based with optional directional translate and custom cubic-bezier curves.

exports.name: zoomIn
exports.description: Zoom in: scale 0.3→1 + opacity 0→1 (opacity 1 at 50%).

exports.name: zoomInDown
exports.description: Zoom in from above: from scale(0.1) translateY(-1000px) with cubic-bezier(0.55,0.055,0.675,0.19) → at 60% scale(0.475) translateY(60px) with cubic-bezier(0.175,0.885,0.32,1).
exports.arkts_notes: scale + translateY + opacity. 3 stops with custom curves. ⚠️ Custom cubic-bezier may map to closest Curve enum value.

exports.name: zoomInLeft
exports.description: Zoom in from left: scale(0.1) translateX(-1000px) → scale(0.475) translateX(10px) at 60%. Custom cubic-bezier curves.

exports.name: zoomInRight
exports.description: Zoom in from right: scale(0.1) translateX(1000px) → scale(0.475) translateX(-10px) at 60%. Custom cubic-bezier curves.

exports.name: zoomInUp
exports.description: Zoom in from below: scale(0.1) translateY(1000px) → scale(0.475) translateY(-60px) at 60%. Custom cubic-bezier curves.

exports.name: zoomOut
exports.description: Zoom out: opacity 1→0 + scale 1→0.3 at 50%.

exports.name: zoomOutDown
exports.description: Zoom out downward: at 40% scale(0.475) translateY(-60px) → scale(0.1) translateY(2000px) + opacity 0. transform-origin: center bottom.
exports.arkts_notes: scale + translateY + opacity. 3 stops. Custom cubic-bezier.

exports.name: zoomOutLeft
exports.description: Zoom out left: at 40% scale(0.475) translateX(42px) → scale(0.1) translateX(-2000px) + opacity 0. transform-origin: left center.

exports.name: zoomOutRight
exports.description: Zoom out right: at 40% scale(0.475) translateX(-42px) → scale(0.1) translateX(2000px) + opacity 0. transform-origin: right center.

exports.name: zoomOutUp
exports.description: Zoom out upward: at 40% scale(0.475) translateY(60px) → scale(0.1) translateY(-2000px) + opacity 0. transform-origin: center bottom.

files.description: Barrel export file re-exporting all 97 animation functions from all category modules.

exports.name: (re-export all)
exports.signature: export { AnimTransform, AnimOptions } from './types'; export { bounce, flash, pulse, rubberBand, shakeX, shakeY, headShake, swing, tada, wobble, jello, heartBeat } from './attention_seekers'; ...
exports.description: Single import point. Consumers: import { fadeIn, bounce, ... } from '@ohos/arkts-animate-css'
exports.arkts_notes: Static export only — no dynamic re-exports. Each export is explicit.

oh-package.json5.description: ArkTS port of animate.css — HarmonyOS animation library with 97 keyframe-based animations

risks: CSS @keyframes → ArkTS KeyframeState mapping: CSS keyframe percentages must be converted to proportional duration values in KeyframeState[]. Each percentage stop becomes a KeyframeState with duration = (stop% - prevStop%) * totalDuration.

3D transforms (rotateX, rotateY, rotate3d, perspective) may have limited or no support in ArkUI. Flipper category (flip, flipInX, flipInY, flipOutX, flipOutY) and headShake use rotateY/rotateX — may need 2D fallback or be excluded.

CSS cubic-bezier timing curves have no exact equivalent in ArkUI Curve enum. The enum offers: Linear, Ease, EaseIn, EaseOut, EaseInOut, FastOutSlowIn, FastOutLinearIn, LinearOutSlowIn, Spring, Friction, Sharp, Rhythm, Smooth, ExtremeDeceleration. Custom bezier points (e.g. cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1)) must map to closest standard curve.
transform-origin (used in swing, hinge, jackInTheBox, rotating, zooming animations) maps to .transformOrigin() modifier — verify API exists and accepts same values (top left, center bottom, etc.).
visibility property (used in sliding animations) maps to .visibility(Visibility.None/Visible) modifier — available in ArkUI.
skewX/skewY transforms (used in jello, lightspeed animations) — verify ArkUI .skew() modifier support.
CSS calc() values (duration × 0.75, × 1.3, × 2) must be computed in ArkTS code at call time.
CSS prefers-reduced-motion media query has no direct ArkTS equivalent — library consumers must check accessibility settings manually.
CSS animation-fill-mode: both — in ArkTS, this is handled by the initial/final state of the component itself, not the animation library.
This is a CSS library port, not TS/JS — there is no source TypeScript code to reference; all code must be authored from scratch based on CSS keyframe definitions.

The keyframeAnimateTo API requires UIContext — the library functions return KeyframeState[] arrays, and the consumer is responsible for calling uiContext.keyframeAnimateTo(param, keyframes) within a component context. This is an architectural decision documented in the API design.
